metadata.name: Create a Drip Campaign for New Leads

description: An agent wants to create an automated email drip campaign to nurture new buyer leads over several weeks.

nodes.task_description: Outline a 6-part email sequence (e.g., Intro, Local Market Info, Buying Process, Testimonials, etc.).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent defines the content and flow of the campaign.

nodes.task_description: Write the content for each of the 6 emails.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates engaging and informative content for the entire campaign.

nodes.task_description: Set up the drip campaign in the CRM, scheduling each email to be sent at a specific interval (e.g., every 4 days).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully configures the automated campaign in the marketing tool.
